name: Sania Mirza
quote: This is to express solidarity with the genuine concerns of students who are the future of our country. Students spend years preparing for competitive exams such as NEET and my heart goes out to them for what they have endured specially in the last few days. Their voices deserve to be heard and their efforts respected. Their disenchantment must be addressed and proper reforms administered in the system. There is no place for violence in our society and we must all work together to find an amicable solution that secures the future of our youth.
